headline: DuPont Launches End-to-End Portfolio to Advance Direct Lithium Extraction
summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced it has launched an end-to-end Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE) portfolio comprising more than 20 products across multiple technologies, designed to improve lithium recovery and provide tailored solutions for diverse brine resources, supporting scalable lithium production amid accelerating global demand.
